effects.label: Floating 3D UI Mockup
effects.description: App UI floats in 3D space with perspective tilt, gentle sine drift, and cinematic depth shadow. Think Google product ad style — the interface hovers and rotates subtly against a gradient mesh backdrop.

effects.label: Cinematic Zoom & Pan
effects.description: Slow camera push-in or pan across the UI, eased with cubic bezier for a filmic feel. Great for revealing features or highlighting a workflow. Pairs well with cursor animation.

effects.label: Feature Zoom Callout
effects.description: Smooth zoom from full-page view into a specific feature area (scale 1→2.2), with a glassmorphism label panel sliding in beside. Hold, then pull back. Like zooming into a map pin.

effects.label: Staggered Card Grid
effects.description: Cards or feature panels animate in one-by-one with spring physics — translateY + opacity + slight rotation. Each card has hover-lift float (sine drift) after landing. Great for feature lists or pricing tiers.

effects.label: Kinetic Typography
effects.description: Headlines animate word-by-word or letter-by-letter with spring delays, scale bounces, or clip-path reveals. Can include shimmer gradient sweep, glow pulse, or color-shift effects on key words.

effects.label: Animated Gradient Mesh
effects.description: Rich organic background with 3-5 radial gradients that drift and pulse using sin/cos. Colors derived from the site's palette. Feels like Apple or Stripe marketing pages.

effects.label: Cursor Click-Through
effects.description: Animated cursor navigates the UI, clicks buttons, fills inputs, or toggles features. Click ripple effect on impact. Demonstrates the product workflow as if a real user is interacting.

effects.label: Light Leak Transition
effects.description: Cinematic light leak overlay (warm amber/white wash) between scenes using @remotion/light-leaks. Smooth 20-30 frame crossfade with hue shift. Premium film-grade scene change.

effects.label: Floating Particle Field
effects.description: Dozens of small luminous dots drift slowly with sine-wave motion, varying sizes and opacities. Creates depth and atmosphere behind the main content. Like dust motes in a sunbeam.

effects.label: Morphing Shape Transitions
effects.description: Geometric shapes (circles, rounded rects, blobs) morph between states using animated clip-path or SVG path interpolation. Great for transitioning between concepts or before/after states.

effects.label: Metric Counter Reveal
effects.description: Key stats and numbers count up from zero with spring physics — 0 → 10,000+ users. Works with percentage bars, revenue figures, or performance metrics. Each counter staggers in with a delay.

effects.label: Split Screen Comparison
effects.description: Screen splits with an animated wipe (clip-path inset or sliding divider) to show before/after or two product states side by side. Labels animate in for each side.

effects.label: Device Frame Showcase
effects.description: Product shown inside realistic browser chrome (Safari/Chrome dots + address bar) or phone frame. Frame slides in with 3D perspective, shadow, and spring landing. The gold standard for SaaS demos.

effects.label: Parallax Depth Layers
effects.description: Three-layer parallax: background moves slowest, mid-layer (orbs/particles) at medium speed, foreground (UI/text) fastest. Creates convincing depth without real 3D. Subtle but premium.

effects.label: Glassmorphism Panels
effects.description: Frosted glass UI panels (backdrop-filter blur + semi-transparent white/dark background + subtle border) that float over content. Modern, premium look for tooltips, feature labels, or stat cards.

effects.label: Animated Icon Burst
effects.description: Icons or emoji spring in with overshoot, then settle with a gentle bounce. Can include a radial burst ring or confetti spray on arrival. Great for feature introductions.

effects.label: Text Highlight Sweep
effects.description: A colored highlight bar sweeps behind key words in a sentence, like a digital marker pen. Draws attention to the value prop. Can combine with scale or glow on the highlighted segment.

effects.label: Orbiting Ring Decorations
effects.description: Dashed or dotted SVG rings that slowly rotate around a central element (logo, product icon, or device frame). Adds tech-forward depth. Rings can pulse opacity or shift color over time.

effects.label: Directional Slide Reveal
effects.description: Content slides in from a direction (right, bottom, diagonal) with eased motion, revealing the next scene or element. Clean and minimal. Can combine with a slight blur-to-sharp focus effect.

effects.label: Confetti Celebration
effects.description: Burst of colorful confetti particles on a milestone moment (sign-up, purchase, achievement). Physics-based gravity and rotation on each piece. Short and punchy — 1-2 seconds.

effects.label: Polished Screen Recording
effects.description: Raw screen recording wrapped in a device frame with auto-zoom on key actions, smooth pan between sections, and motion blur on fast movements. Transforms boring screencasts into premium demos.

effects.label: Logo Reveal with Spring
effects.description: Logo enters with a satisfying spring bounce (scale 0→1 with overshoot), optional rotation, and a subtle glow pulse on landing. Can include particle burst behind the logo.

effects.label: Animated Progress Bar
effects.description: A progress or loading bar fills with eased motion, changing color at thresholds. Can include percentage counter alongside. Great for showing improvement, completion, or performance gains.

effects.label: Notification Toast Pop
effects.description: UI notification toasts slide in from edges with spring physics, hold briefly, then slide out. Shows the product sending real-time updates. Stack multiple for a busy-app feel.
